responses: Hello! Welcome to GymOS Support Assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! How can I assist you with your fitness portal today?
Greetings! I am GymBot AI, your personal fitness system assistant. What are we looking for?
Goodbye! Stay fit, stay active!
See you later! Don't forget your next workout!
Bye! Have an energetic day ahead!

We offer multiple flexible packages tailored to your schedule:

* **Starter Plan**: ₹500/month (Basic access)
* **Student Discount Pack**: ₹1,000/month (Requires Student ID)
* **Pilates Core Focus**: ₹2,000/month (Specialist Pilates)
* **Corporate Elite Pass**: ₹10,000/year (12 Months Elite access)

You can renew or upgrade your package directly from your member billing dashboard.

Our premium and costliest package is the **Corporate Elite Pass** priced at **₹10,000/year** (or ₹34,990/year for multi-branch Professional access). It grants complete access to state-of-the-art facilities, trainer schedules, and supplement POS discounts.
Our most affordable package is the **Starter Plan** at only **₹500/month**. We also offer a **1 Day Trial** for **₹0** if you want to try our facilities first!

Yes! We support a **1 Day Trial** package for only ₹0! You can choose this plan during member registration or renewal to experience our state-of-the-art facilities before selecting a recurring billing interval.

Our branches host certified fitness coaches specializing in Strength & Conditioning, Powerlifting, HIIT, and Yoga. Members can be assigned a personal trainer to design custom workout and diet plans in their portal profile.
We run group classes daily including Yoga, HIIT, and Power Weightlifting. You can view timings, trainer assignments, and book slot capacities in real-time under the **Classes & Bookings** panel.

GymOS supports multi-branch scaling! Admins can create and isolate branches. Currently, our main Central Headquarter Branch is located at Central Plaza, Suite 402, and operates from 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM.

Check-ins are automated via the **GymSyncAgent** desktop client. It interfaces with biometric hardware (ZKTeco/eSSL logs) and syncs logs locally and to the cloud. If offline, logs are safely cached in SQLite and retried upon reconnection.
You can manage your identity in your **My Profile** tab. Here, you can edit your name, contact phone, update passwords, and upload custom profile pictures or select preset avatars.
We support secure payments via **Razorpay** (online UPI, Cards, NetBanking) and cash. All billing ledger records are logged, and invoices are generated with GST information for reconciliation.

patterns: what time does the gym open
responses: Our facilities are open daily from **6:00 AM to 10:00 PM**. Please ensure you bring indoor athletic shoes, a sweat towel, and follow equipment sanitation guidelines after completing your sets.

For Admins, you can view the complete member registry, their active registration statuses, emergency contacts, and active plans under the **Members** section. The dashboard also aggregates real-time monthly check-ins and signups.

patterns: how to use the gym project
responses: GymOS is a premium SaaS Gym Management platform featuring multi-branch isolation, billing portals, schedules/classes booking, check-in kiosk tracking, and supplement POS systems. It supports four distinct roles: Administrator, Staff, Trainer, and Member. Ask me about a specific role to learn more!

As an **Administrator**, you have complete control over your gym branches:

1. **Dashboard**: View branch revenue, member metrics, peak hours, and check-in logs.
2. **Branches**: Add/edit branches and assign managers.
3. **Membership Plans**: Create, edit, and deactivate subscription tiers.
4. **Equipment**: Track gym assets, quantities, and service maintenance dates.
5. **SaaS Subscription**: Purchase or renew your platform subscription passes.

As a **Staff Member/Receptionist**, you manage day-to-day operations for your branch:

1. **Member Registry**: Onboard and register new members, freeze profiles, or review membership expiry dates.
2. **Billing & Payments**: Record membership fees, process manual payments, and email digital receipts.
3. **Supplement POS**: Check out protein/supplements, manage stock inventory levels, and log sales.
4. **Check-Ins**: Monitor active entries in real-time.

As a **Trainer**, you manage fitness plans and group classes:

1. **Group Classes**: Create and manage workout sessions, set capacities, and check enrolled member rosters.
2. **Member Rosters**: Track client goals, write progress feedback logs, and assign personal diet routine guides.

As a **Member**, you have self-service access to your fitness journey:

1. **Portal**: View your active subscription plans, remaining days, and invoice payment receipts.
2. **Group Classes**: Browse scheduled sessions and book a slot.
3. **Profile**: Upload your avatar photo, customize profile details, and update your phone number.

The **Check-In Kiosk** is a self-service page where members can log their attendance. Members can either enter their unique Member ID or scan their QR code on their phone screen. This instantly logs their check-in and updates the occupancy charts on the admin dashboard in real-time.

The **Dashboard** is the administrative homepage. For Admins and Staff, it displays real-time summaries of total active members, monthly branch revenue, today's check-ins, pending payments, active trainers, and expiring subscriptions, alongside weekly registration and peak hour charts.

The **Members Directory** is the central list of all registered member accounts. Admins and Staff can view check-in history, search by name or email, onboard new members, freeze profiles, check subscription end dates, and edit emergency contacts.

The **Membership Plans** page is where Admins define packages (e.g. Starter Plan, Pilates Focus). You can configure rates, duration (monthly, half-yearly, yearly), and class privileges. Staff and members can see these plans, but only Admins can create or modify them.

The **Billing & Payments** section is the financial ledger of your branch. Staff can record payments (cash, card, bank transfer), review outstanding balances, generate PDF invoices, and send receipt notifications to members.

The **Classes & Bookings** panel manages fitness schedule rosters. Trainers can create group class sessions, assign workout areas, set capacities, and check enrolled member rosters. Members can browse and book slots directly from their portal.
The **Equipment** section tracks your branch gym machines, dumbbells, and cardio assets. You can log total quantities, conditions, and set next maintenance/service dates to prevent failures.
The **Supplements Inventory** acts as a Point-of-Sale (POS) system. Staff can track protein/supplement inventory, record transactions, monitor low stock levels, and log sales trends.
The **Branches** section enables multi-branch operations. Administrators can add new branch locations, assign branch managers, and verify separate telemetry configurations.
The **My Profile** tab allows users to maintain their identity. You can upload custom avatars, edit name and phone details, modify passwords, and view recent role-based updates.

I can help you navigate GymOS! Ask me about:

1. **Membership Plans & Rates**
2. **Group Class Schedules & Bookings**
3. **Updating Profile details & pictures**
4. **Biometric agent check-ins**
5. **Branch locations and timing**
